text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Elms Stakes race, Haru Urara is
much more serious than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right before the start of the race, her shopping
district friends, who have come a long way in
order to support her, start cheering her on,
explaining that they want to see her win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing their cheers, Haru Urara feels something
different than her usual excitement...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She rushes out to the track... She's not running
just for fun this time—she's running to win.
